achievements.title: This Ain't No Hike
achievements.description: [Any Character] Kill the first Zombie with an Infinite Weapon. Infinite Weapon unlocks will block all progression achievements and some challenges. All achievements must also be earned on Normal Difficulty or higher. Read forum topic for more info.
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Is It Bingo Night Again?
achievements.description: [Chris] Return to the Main Hall and find that everybody's gone
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Sit, Boy, Sit! Good Dog!
achievements.description: [Chris] Blow the Dog Whistle and successfully take the collar from the Cerberus that answers the call
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Hope He Doesn't Return with a Bomb
achievements.description: [Chris] Put down Forest after he reanimates as a zombie

achievements.title: Comrades till the End
achievements.description: [Chris] Help Rebecca save Richard by getting him medicine

achievements.description: [Any Character] Escape from Lisa Trevor's cabin without taking damage

achievements.title: Will Never Shoot a Bullet in My Life
achievements.description: [Any Character] Complete the game in one session using no weapons other than the Knife

achievements.title: Good For Building Muscles
achievements.description: [Chris] Complete the game in one session without using an Item Box (must NOT be playing Real Survival)

achievements.description: [Any Character] Complete Invisible Enemy without saving on Hard Difficulty (Final Boss Required)

achievements.title: Just like The Boss
achievements.description: [Any Character] In one session, kill 5 enemies using the Survival Knife, without unequipping it (resets upon returning to main menu)

achievements.title: A Trusty Sidekick
achievements.description: [Any Character] In one session, kill 20 enemies with the Handgun (resets upon returning to main menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: For Popping Heads
achievements.description: [Any Character] In one session, kill 20 enemies with the Shotgun (resets upon returning to main menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: In Memory of Richard
achievements.description: [Any Character] In one session, kill 20 enemies with the Assault Shotgun (resets upon returning to main menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Equipped with Ballistics
achievements.description: [Jill] In one session, kill 20 enemies with the Grenade Launcher (any rounds) (resets upon returning to main menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Packing a Real Punch
achievements.description: [Any Character] In one session, kill 10 enemies with the Magnum Revolver (resets upon returning to main menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Most Powerful Handgun in the World
achievements.description: [Jill] In one session, kill 5 enemies with Barry's .44 Magnum (resets upon returning to main menu)

achievements.title: The Reason Wesker Loves This Thing
achievements.description: [Any Character] In one session, kill 30 enemies with the Samurai Edge (resets upon returning to main menu)

achievements.title: Such Power... It Feels Good to Wield
achievements.description: [Any Character] In one session, kill 40 enemies with the Infinite Rocket Launcher (resets upon returning to main menu)
